title: Origins: Blobidon
description:
Born of strange, malleable matter, the Blobidon is a 
shape-shifting survivor whose body adapts to every blow.
body:
# **__𝐁𝐋𝐎𝐁𝐈𝐃𝐎𝐍__** 🟢⚫⚫
ㅤ
Born of strange, malleable matter, the Blobidon is a 
shape-shifting survivor whose body adapts to every blow.  

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ 𝑨𝑩𝑰𝑳𝑰𝑻𝑰𝑬𝑺 ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
 
## 🟡 𝗠𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗺
> Depending on how many HP you have, you will become smaller, making you a more difficult target to hit, but losing range in the process.

## 🟢 𝗩𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
> Every time you get smaller, you lose pieces of yourself along the way. Pick them up to regain some life before they disappear.

## 🟢 𝗘𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗟𝗮𝘂𝗻𝗰𝗵
> Charge up for a powerful goo-fueled leap
> → Higher charge = Higher jump + Longer cooldown
> 
> *You will need to hold down the skill button to charge the jump.*

## 🟢 𝗚𝗲𝗹 𝗗𝘆𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗰𝘀
> Having such a gelatinous body allows you to bounce around like a block of slime. You can alternate this ability with the secondary button.


▬▬▬▬▬▬ 𝑹𝑬𝑸𝑼𝑰𝑹𝑬𝑴𝑬𝑵𝑻𝑺 ▬▬▬▬▬▬
- Origins 
- Pehkui
*Only tested on Forge version 1.20.1*


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ 𝙀𝙓𝙏𝙍𝘼  𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

This is the first datapack I've made. It's designed for good mobility, but it may be a little unbalanced, as I made it for a mod pack where its mobility is no longer so exaggerated on mid/late game.
I wasn't sure whether to publish it, as I would like to improve the mechanics and make it feel better, but unfortunately the datapacks are VERY limited, so from now on I will only make mods. I hope you like it!

**_This is my first datapack, so please, I would greatly appreciate any feedback or bug reports!_**
### Discord server → **https://discord.gg/yGxdvA7qej**
